message.primary_message: The corn ethanol mandate is environmentally harmful, costly for consumers, and losing political support.

CORN ETHANOL PRODUCTION EMISSIONS ARE 6-66% HIGHER THAN PETROLEUM — MOTHER JONES 1.26.16
LOWERING THE ETHANOL REQUIREMENT IS GOOD FOR CONSUMERS — BLOOMBERG 12.1.15
ETHANOL IS NO LONGER THE THIRD RAIL OF THE IOWA CAUCUS — TIME MAGAZINE 1.28.16
SPONSORED BY THE AMERICAN COUNCIL FOR CAPITAL FORMATION, THE NATIONAL MARINE MANUFACTURERS ASSOCIATION, AND THE NATIONAL COUNCIL OF CHAIN RESTAURANTS.
